from dotenv import load_dotenv
import os, sys
load_dotenv\('../.env'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from sqlalchemy import text
from models import get_engine

engine = get_engine\(\)
print\('Running Migration 010: Adding soft-delete columns...'\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    # Add is_deleted to posts
    conn.execute\(text\('''
        ALTER TABLE posts
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
    '''\)\)
    print\('  ✓ Added is_deleted to posts'\)

    # Add is_deleted to post_replies
    conn.execute\(text\('''
        ALTER TABLE post_replies
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
    '''\)\)
    print\('  ✓ Added is_deleted to post_replies'\)

    # Add updated_at to post_replies
    conn.execute\(text\('''
        ALTER TABLE post_replies
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\);
    '''\)\)
    print\('  ✓ Added updated_at to post_replies'\)

    conn.commit\(\)
    print\(\)
    print\('Verifying columns added...'\)
    result = conn.execute\(text\(\\"\\"\\"
        SELECT column_name, data_type
        FROM information_schema.columns
        WHERE table_name = 'posts' AND column_name = 'is_deleted'
    \\"\\"\\"\)\)
    print\('  posts.is_deleted:', result.fetchall\(\)\)

    result2 = conn.execute\(text\(\\"\\"\\"
        SELECT column_name, data_type
        FROM information_schema.columns
        WHERE table_name = 'post_replies' AND column_name IN \('is_deleted', 'updated_at'\)
        ORDER BY column_name
    \\"\\"\\"\)\)
    print\('  post_replies columns:', result2.fetchall\(\)\)

print\(\)
print\('Migration 010 complete.'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, os
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('../.env'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from sqlalchemy import text
from models import get_engine

engine = get_engine\(\)
print\('Running Migration 010: Adding soft-delete columns...'\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    conn.execute\(text\('ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE'\)\)
    print\('  OK: Added is_deleted to posts'\)

    conn.execute\(text\('ALTER TABLE post_replies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE'\)\)
    print\('  OK: Added is_deleted to post_replies'\)

    conn.execute\(text\('ALTER TABLE post_replies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)'\)\)
    print\('  OK: Added updated_at to post_replies'\)

    conn.commit\(\)

    print\('Verifying...'\)
    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='posts' AND column_name='is_deleted'\\"\)\)
    print\('  posts.is_deleted:', r.fetchall\(\)\)

    r2 = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='post_replies' AND column_name IN \('is_deleted','updated_at'\) ORDER BY column_name\\"\)\)
    print\('  post_replies columns:', r2.fetchall\(\)\)

print\('Migration 010 DONE.'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/pavle/Desktop/salsa_lab_v2/backend && venv_backup/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import sys, os
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('../.env'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from sqlalchemy import text
from models import get_engine

engine = get_engine\(\)
print\('Running Migration 011: Creating notifications table...'\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    conn.execute\(text\('''
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications \(
            id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
            user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            type VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL,
            title VARCHAR\(200\) NOT NULL,
            message TEXT NOT NULL,
            reference_type VARCHAR\(50\),
            reference_id VARCHAR\(100\),
            is_read BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
            created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\)
        \)
    '''\)\)
    print\('  OK: Created notifications table'\)

    conn.execute\(text\('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications\(user_id\)'\)\)
    print\('  OK: Created idx_notifications_user_id index'\)

    conn.execute\(text\('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications\(user_id, is_read\) WHERE is_read = FALSE'\)\)
    print\('  OK: Created idx_notifications_user_unread index'\)

    conn.commit\(\)

    print\('Verifying...'\)
    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='notifications' ORDER BY ordinal_position\\"\)\)
    cols = r.fetchall\(\)
    for col in cols:
        print\(f'  notifications.{col[0]}: {col[1]}'\)

print\('Migration 011 DONE.'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('../.env'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from sqlalchemy import text
from models import get_engine

engine = get_engine\(\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    print\('=== DATABASE VERIFICATION ==='\)

    # Verify user count unchanged
    r = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users'\)\)
    print\(f'users: {r.fetchone\(\)[0]} rows \(unchanged\)'\)

    # Verify posts table
    r = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM posts'\)\)
    print\(f'posts: {r.fetchone\(\)[0]} rows'\)

    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='posts' AND column_name='is_deleted'\\"\)\)
    print\(f'posts.is_deleted column: {\\"EXISTS\\" if r.fetchone\(\) else \\"MISSING\\"}'\)

    # Verify post_replies table
    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='post_replies' AND column_name IN \('is_deleted','updated_at'\) ORDER BY column_name\\"\)\)
    cols = [row[0] for row in r.fetchall\(\)]
    print\(f'post_replies new columns: {cols}'\)

    # Verify notifications table
    r = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM notifications'\)\)
    print\(f'notifications: {r.fetchone\(\)[0]} rows \(new empty table\)'\)

    # Verify indexes
    r = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='notifications' ORDER BY indexname\\"\)\)
    indexes = [row[0] for row in r.fetchall\(\)]
    print\(f'notifications indexes: {indexes}'\)

    print\(\)
    print\('All verifications passed - no data deleted.'\)
" 2>&1)
